system.flavor: You place a holy seal over your ally, enveloping them in divine protection.
system.effect:
Mark an ally in range. While marked, any foe that attempts to use an ability that includes that ally as a target must first save. On a successful save, the foe is branded and the mark fades. On a failed save, the chosen ally takes 1/2 damage from the ability, and gains [+] on any saves against its effects. Then the mark fades.
Overdrive may mark a second ally without replacing this mark.

(Overdrive automatically at round 3 or later.)
